from celery import group, chord, chain
from myapp.tasks import send_notification, process_item, generate_report


def notify_all_users(users):
    job = group(send_notification.s(user.email, "Your report is ready") for user in users)
    job.apply_async()


def batch_process_items(items):
    job = group(process_item.s(item.id) for item in items)
    job.apply_async(countdown=10)


def generate_reports_for_team(team_members):
    job = group(generate_report.s(m.id, m.department) for m in team_members)
    job.apply_async()


def enqueue_orders(orders):
    tasks = []
    for order in orders:
        tasks.append(
            chain(
                process_item.s(order.id),
                send_notification.s(order.customer_email, "Order processed"),
            )
        )
    group(tasks).apply_async()
